content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hi, thanks for picking up — I'm Ashley Brown and I'm in a lot of pain with my knee. It's really swollen and I can barely walk on it. Do you have any openings today or tomorrow?
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes.
Yeah, that's fine — but can you help me? I really need to see someone today or tomorrow, my knee is pretty bad.
The agent said: Orthopedics, part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?
No, I'm Ashley Brown — look, I don't have time for a long call, my knee is killing me. Do you have same-day or next-day appointments available?
The agent said: I understand please provide your date of birth so I can look up your chart.
July 29, 1990 — can you just check if there's anything open today or tomorrow?
The agent said: Just to confirm, I have your name is Ashley Brown and your date of birth as July 29th 1990.
Yes, that's right — so do you have any urgent openings today or tomorrow?

The agent said: Would you like me to look up your record using the phone number you have on file with us? If so please tell me that number, if you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth. Again just let me know.
My phone number is 650-555-0187 — can you just check the appointments now?
The agent said: I have your phone number is 650-555-0187 and your date of birth as July 29th 1990.
Yes, that's all correct — please, can you tell me if there are any openings today or tomorrow?
The agent said: I can't receive further right now but I can make sure our Clinic support team follows up with you. Would you like me to connect you to our patient support team?
Yes, please connect me — but tell them it's urgent, I need to be seen today or tomorrow if possible.
The agent said: Connecting you to a representative please wait hello you reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.
Wait — hello? Is anyone there? I really need help with my knee pain today!
